item.title: Checkers Shells [Chess]
item.itunes:title: Checkers Shells [Chess]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
Checkers Shells
(Chess)
Linux offline version of the popular game
This underwater-inspired checker game lets you play checker using these shells.
[read more]

item.title: Henry Stickmin 5 Fleeing the Complex [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: Henry Stickmin 5 Fleeing the Complex [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
Henry Stickmin 5 Fleeing the Complex
(Various Games)
Linux offline version of the popular game
Henry is taken to The Wall, a highly secured prison complex said to hold some of the most notorious criminals — and tries to escape from there, with or without an ally.
[read more]

item.title: Gun Mayhem 2 [Shooter]
item.itunes:title: Gun Mayhem 2 [Shooter]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
Gun Mayhem 2
(Shooter)
Linux offline version of the popular game
More explosive arena style action! Battle against the AI or with friends in this cartoony platform shooter. Up to 4 players can play at once!

Gun Mayhem returns with brand new maps, and much more:
- new campaign with 16 progressively challenging missions
- challenge levels to test your skills
- 7 custom game modes
- new guns, perks, and customization options
Controls

*** controls can be edited in game options ***

Player 1 controls:
Arrow keys - movement
Z - shoot
X - throw bomb

Player 2 controls:
WASD - movement
T - shoot
Y - throw bomb

Players 3 and 4 controls can be edited in options
[read more]
item.description:

(Shooter)

Gun Mayhem 2
(Shooter)
Linux offline version of the popular game
More explosive arena style action! Battle against the AI or with friends in this cartoony platform shooter. Up to 4 players can play at once!

Gun Mayhem returns with brand new maps, and much more:
- new campaign with 16 progressively challenging missions
- challenge levels to test your skills
- 7 custom game modes
- new guns, perks, and customization options
Controls

*** controls can be edited in game options ***

Player 1 controls:
Arrow keys - movement
Z - shoot
X - throw bomb

Player 2 controls:
WASD - movement
T - shoot
Y - throw bomb

Players 3 and 4 controls can be edited in options
[read more]

item.title: Gun Mayhem [Shooter]
item.itunes:title: Gun Mayhem [Shooter]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
Gun Mayhem
(Shooter)
Linux offline version of the popular game
Gun Mayhem is a high octane arena style versus game! Battle with or against AI and friends alike in this cartoony platform shooter

- Supports up to 4 players at once
- Utilize over 60 different firearms
- 12 diverse maps to fight on
- 4 unique gameplay modes: Last Man Standing, One Shot One Kill, Gun Game and Duck Defense
- Campaign mode includes coop option
- Customizable characters
Controls

***Controls can be edited in game option***
Arrow Keys - Movement
Left Square Bracket ( [ ) - Shoot
Right Square Bracket ( ] ) - Throw Bomb

Players 2 - 4 Controls can be edited in options.

[read more]
item.description:
Gun Mayhem
(Shooter)
Linux offline version of the popular game
Gun Mayhem is a high octane arena style versus game! Battle with or against AI and friends alike in this cartoony platform shooter

- Supports up to 4 players at once
- Utilize over 60 different firearms
- 12 diverse maps to fight on
- 4 unique gameplay modes: Last Man Standing, One Shot One Kill, Gun Game and Duck Defense
- Campaign mode includes coop option
- Customizable characters
Controls

***Controls can be edited in game option***
Arrow Keys - Movement
Left Square Bracket ( [ ) - Shoot
Right Square Bracket ( ] ) - Throw Bomb

Players 2 - 4 Controls can be edited in options.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Gun Mayhem
(Shooter)
Linux offline version of the popular game
Gun Mayhem is a high octane arena style versus game! Battle with or against AI and friends alike in this cartoony platform shooter

- Supports up to 4 players at once
- Utilize over 60 different firearms
- 12 diverse maps to fight on
- 4 unique gameplay modes: Last Man Standing, One Shot One Kill, Gun Game and Duck Defense
- Campaign mode includes coop option
- Customizable characters
Controls

Arrow Keys - Movement
Left Square Bracket ( [ ) - Shoot
Right Square Bracket ( ] ) - Throw Bomb

Players 2 - 4 Controls can be edited in options.

item.title: The Binding of Isaac Demo [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: The Binding of Isaac Demo [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
The Binding of Isaac Demo
(Various Games)
Linux offline version of the popular game
Demo version of the game
The full version of the game is available here: https://store.steampowered.com/app/113200/The_Binding_of_Isaac/

When Isaac’s mother starts hearing the voice of God demanding a sacrifice be made to prove her faith, Isaac escapes into the basement facing droves of deranged enemies, lost brothers and sisters, his fears, and eventually his mother.
The Binding of Isaac is a randomly generated action RPG shooter with heavy Rogue-like elements. Following Isaac on his journey players will find bizarre treasures that change Isaac’s form giving him super human abilities and enabling him to fight off droves of mysterious creatures, discover secrets and fight his way to safety.
Key features:

Randomly generated dungeons, items enemies and bosses, you never play the same game twice.
Over 100 unique items that not only give you powers but visually change your character.
50+ enemy types each with the ability to become "special" making them extra deadly but they also drop better loot.
Over 20 bosses.
4 full chapters spanning 8 levels
3+ unlockable classes
Multiple endings
Tons of unlockable items, enemies, bosses and more.
[read more]
item.description:
The Binding of Isaac Demo
(Various Games)
Linux offline version of the popular game
Demo version of the game
The full version of the game is available here: https://store.steampowered.com/app/113200/The_Binding_of_Isaac/

When Isaac’s mother starts hearing the voice of God demanding a sacrifice be made to prove her faith, Isaac escapes into the basement facing droves of deranged enemies, lost brothers and sisters, his fears, and eventually his mother.
The Binding of Isaac is a randomly generated action RPG shooter with heavy Rogue-like elements. Following Isaac on his journey players will find bizarre treasures that change Isaac’s form giving him super human abilities and enabling him to fight off droves of mysterious creatures, discover secrets and fight his way to safety.
Key features:

Randomly generated dungeons, items enemies and bosses, you never play the same game twice.

(Various Games)

Demo version of the game
The full version of the game is available here: https://store.steampowered.com/app/113200/The_Binding_of_Isaac/

When Isaac’s mother starts hearing the voice of God demanding a sacrifice be made to prove her faith, Isaac escapes into the basement facing droves of deranged enemies, lost brothers and sisters, his fears, and eventually his mother.
The Binding of Isaac is a randomly generated action RPG shooter with heavy Rogue-like elements. Following Isaac on his journey players will find bizarre treasures that change Isaac’s form giving him super human abilities and enabling him to fight off droves of mysterious creatures, discover secrets and fight his way to safety.
Key features:

Randomly generated dungeons, items enemies and bosses, you never play the same game twice.
Over 100 unique items that not only give you powers but visually change your character.
50+ enemy types each with the ability to become "special" making them extra deadly but they also drop better loot.
Over 20 bosses.
4 full chapters spanning 8 levels
3+ unlockable classes
Multiple endings
Tons of unlockable items, enemies, bosses and more.
[read more]

item.title: Red Ball 1 [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: Red Ball 1 [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
Red Ball 1
(Jump N Run)
Linux offline version of the popular game
Red Ball is a game that involves physics, puzzle and action all together in a single game. It consists of a total of 12 levels and the challenge you face in each level increases as you go up. The game basically has a hero that has to be moved across the various obstacles in its path to the goal.

Game Controls

The game can be played using the different keys in the keyboard. The arrow keys are used for movement.

Use right arrow key for the ball to move forward.
Use Up arrow key for the ball to move up.
Combine both up and right arrow keys for the ball to jump over obstacles and move forward.
Use left arrow key for the ball to move backward.
Use down arrow key for the ball to move down.
The key ‘R’ can be used to restart the game at any point of the game. It will restart the level being played.
The key ‘P’ can be used to pause the game.
Escape key can be used to quit the game.

The game is more like a physics puzzle, where you can apply the principles of physics to each level to easily achieve the target. Each of the levels of this game has something different. The first level is the easiest part of the game. There are pits in between the blocks and you can reach the goal flag by simply co-coordinating the arrow keys. But the difficulty starts from the next level and increases as you go up. The second level has a funny ball which moves like a pendulum which can push back the ball if you are not careful. There are thorns in the third level and axes in the fourth level. The length of the game too increases as the levels increase.
[read more]
item.description:
Red Ball 1
(Jump N Run)
Linux offline version of the popular game
Red Ball is a game that involves physics, puzzle and action all together in a single game. It consists of a total of 12 levels and the challenge you face in each level increases as you go up. The game basically has a hero that has to be moved across the various obstacles in its path to the goal.

Game Controls

The game can be played using the different keys in the keyboard. The arrow keys are used for movement.

Use right arrow key for the ball to move forward.
Use Up arrow key for the ball to move up.
Combine both up and right arrow keys for the ball to jump over obstacles and move forward.
Use left arrow key for the ball to move backward.
Use down arrow key for the ball to move down.
The key ‘R’ can be used to restart the game at any point of the game. It will restart the level being played.
The key ‘P’ can be used to pause the game.
Escape key can be used to quit the game.

The game is more like a physics puzzle, where you can apply the principles of physics to each level to easily achieve the target. Each of the levels of this game has something different. The first level is the easiest part of the game. There are pits in between the blocks and you can reach the goal flag by simply co-coordinating the arrow keys. But the difficulty starts from the next level and increases as you go up. The second level has a funny ball which moves like a pendulum which can push back the ball if you are not careful. There are thorns in the third level and axes in the fourth level. The length of the game too increases as the levels increase.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Red Ball 1
(Jump N Run)
Linux offline version of the popular game
Red Ball is a game that involves physics, puzzle and action all together in a single game. It consists of a total of 12 levels and the challenge you face in each level increases as you go up. The game basically has a hero that has to be moved across the various obstacles in its path to the goal.

Game Controls

The game can be played using the different keys in the keyboard. The arrow keys are used for movement.

Use right arrow key for the ball to move forward.
Use Up arrow key for the ball to move up.
Combine both up and right arrow keys for the ball to jump over obstacles and move forward.
Use left arrow key for the ball to move backward.
Use down arrow key for the ball to move down.
The key ‘R’ can be used to restart the game at any point of the game. It will restart the level being played.
The key ‘P’ can be used to pause the game.
Escape key can be used to quit the game.

The game is more like a physics puzzle, where you can apply the principles of physics to each level to easily achieve the target. Each of the levels of this game has something different. The first level is the easiest part of the game. There are pits in between the blocks and you can reach the goal flag by simply co-coordinating the arrow keys. But the difficulty starts from the next level and increases as you go up. The second level has a funny ball which moves like a pendulum which can push back the ball if you are not careful. There are thorns in the third level and axes in the fourth level. The length of the game too increases as the levels increase.
[read more]
